title: Tinkers' Gadgets
description: A lightweight Tinkers' Construct addon featuring tools, new materials, and exclusive projectile traits.
body:
# Tinkers' Gadgets

**Tinkers' Gadgets** is a lightweight add-on for Tinkers' Construct 2 that adds new tools, parts, and materials.

---

## Features

### 🪃 Boomerang

An early-game ranged weapon craftable before the Tool Forge.

- Made with **two knife blades** and a **clasp**.
- **Right-click** to charge, release to throw.
- Automatically returns after impact.
- Each Boomerang is tracked independently—use multiple at once.

### 🔪 Throwing Knife

A mid-range throwing weapon inspired by the original Tinkers' Construct from the 1.7.10 era.

- Made with a **knife blade**, **arrow shaft**, and **grip**.
- **Right-click** to charge and throw a single knife.
- **Sneak + right-click** charges longer to fan out three knives.
- Knives can be picked up after impact to recover ammunition.

### 🔫 Heat Ray Gun

A high‑tech energy weapon that fires devastating heat rays.

- Made with a **tough tool rod**, **large plate**, **fuel tank**, and **heat ray emitter**.
- **Right-click** to charge, automatically fires after full charge.
- Consumes fuel (any burnable item) per shot; fuel capacity and efficiency depend on the Fuel Tank material.
- Overheats after continuous fire; cooldown scales with Heat Capacity.
- Supports materials:  
  - **Fuel Tank**: Brick, Nether Brick, Iron, Stone, Cobalt.  
  - **Heat Ray Emitter**: Iron, Stone, Cobalt (Stone parts are only useful for casting molds).

### 🎯 Projectile Traits

Exclusive traits for thrown weapons:

| Trait           | Effect                                                                            |
| --------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Piercing        | Pierces through up to 3 enemies without altering flight path.                     |
| Bouncing        | Bounces up to 3 times between nearby foes, with damage decreasing 25% per bounce. |
| Return Damage   | Damages foes during return flight.                                                |
| Fracture        | Splits into two shards on hit.                                                    |
| Hooked Blade    | Latches onto targets for continuous damage.                                       |
| Collection      | Collects nearby items and XP while flying.                                        |
| Deflect         | Knocks away incoming projectiles during flight.                                   |
| Interactive     | Simulates right-click on block impact.                                            |
| Instant Return  | Vanishes on impact for rapid follow-up throws.                                    |
| Rebound         | 50% chance to bounce off targets and drop, allowing recovery.                     |
| Recovery        | Automatically returns after hitting a block.                                      |
| Shatter         | Destroys soft blocks on impact.                                                   |

### 🧪 Materials for the Clasp

| Material              | Trait           |
| --------------------- | --------------- |
| Leather               | None            |
| Glass                 | Fracture        |
| Slimeball             | Bouncing        |
| Popped Chorus Fruit   | Piercing        |
| Nether Quartz         | Hooked Blade    |
| Magma Cream           | Return Damage   |
| Shulker Shell         | Collection      |
| Redstone              | Interactive     |
| Blue Slimeball        | Deflect         |
| Ender Pearl           | Instant Return  |
| Prismarine Crystals   | Shatter         |

### 🧪 Materials for the Grip

| Material      | Trait     |
| ------------- | --------- |
| Leather       | None      |
| Slimeball     | Rebound   |
| Wool          | None      |
| Shulker Shell | Recovery  |

---

## Installation

1. Install **Minecraft Forge** for 1.12.2.
2. Install **Tinkers' Construct 2** (1.12.2-2.13.0.183+).
3. Place the mod `.jar` in your `mods` folder.

---

> **For 1.20.1:** Most content has been ported to **Casual Tinkering**.

---

## Notes

_Code written with AI assistance._
